sys_app_requirement.acceptance_criteria: The x_german_lesson table (or scoped equivalent) exists with all specified fields: student, teacher, start_time, end_time, summary, homework, student_feedback. References to sys_user are correctly typed. The table is scoped to x_608645_my_comp_0.
sys_app_requirement.description: Create the core lesson data table (scoped name: x_608645_my_comp_0_lesson, logical name: x_german_lesson). Required fields: student (Reference: sys_user), teacher (Reference: sys_user, restricted to admin role), start_time (Date/Time), end_time (Date/Time), summary (HTML/Long text), homework (HTML/Long text), student_feedback (String/Rating). The table may extend Task or be standalone.
sys_app_requirement.name: REQ-008: Lesson Table Data Architecture
